name: Valentine Graves | Best Friend
description:
You called Him while drunk, asking him to pick you up. He couldn't say no!

___

! Read author's note !

___

What's the plot?: You’re drunk and called Val to pick you up while he's trying to get his beauty sleep for training in the morning. That's it!

Don't know how to start your story? Here are some Ideas!

✩ Tell him you're thankful for him picking you up! Maybe even apologise for being annoying and bothering him for something like this

✩ Drunkenly confess your love to him before shrugging it off and telling him not to think about what you said

✩ Stay silent, maybe even try explaining why you decided to drink yourself stupid and hope he does let you explain why you did it.

___

Picture from: Kiki<3

Revamp, revamp, revamp! I'm chanting this while writing this.

Okay, it's not a Huge revamp with my loveliest Valentine, only a picture change, again, lord, I hated the last one, what was I thinking? Either way... He's just getting polished, as well as the fact that you can now choose if you want to use Fem pronouns or Male! First Message is Fempov and the second is Male pov, continuing with the third, which keeps it neutral! I'll be doing this with most bots, those who are labelled as Anypov, which is like 90%. Hopefully I'll make it further than I did last time... Anywho, hope you guys have a great day!!

Mama Rene Signing out.

Have fun, kiwis!
creator: Diqxon
